title: SUBSCRIBE OUTRO — Sara + Eva direct to camera
negativePrompt: extra people, duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same person, mirrored figure, background extras, third child, second sister
prompt: Medium two-shot in @Livingroom. @Sara on the LEFT and @Eva on the RIGHT face directly toward the camera, smiling brightly, waving with both hands. @Sara: "Subscribe so you don't miss new videos!" @Eva: "New episodes every week!"
